steps.title: Write the center form
steps.content:
A circle with center $(h,k)$ has equation
$$(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2$$
With center $(-3,7)$, this becomes
$$(x+3)^2+(y-7)^2=r^2$$

steps.title: Complete the equation
steps.content:
Substitute $r^2=100$ into the circle equation.
$$(x+3)^2+(y-7)^2=100$$
The answer is D.
